mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_knowledge_state ( user_id, knowledge_point_id, mastery, confidence, attempt_count, correct_count, wrong_count, last_event_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{knowledgePointId}, IF(#{correct}, 0.6500, 0.2500), 0.3000, 1, IF(#{correct}, 1, 0), IF(#{correct}, 0, 1), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, correct_count = correct_count + IF(#{correct}, 1, 0), wrong_count = wrong_count + IF(#{correct}, 0, 1), mastery = LEAST(1.0000, GREATEST(0.0000, mastery + IF(#{correct}, 0.0600, -0.1000))), confidence = LEAST(1.0000, confidence + 0.0300), last_event_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO student_mistake_book ( user_id, question_id, knowledge_point_id, first_wrong_answer_id, last_answer_id, status, wrong_count, last_wrong_time, next_review_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{questionId}, #{knowledgePointId}, #{customerAnswerId}, #{customerAnswerId}, 'open', 1, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE knowledge_point_id = COALESCE(VALUES(knowledge_point_id), knowledge_point_id), last_answer_id = VALUES(last_answer_id), status = 'open', wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, last_wrong_time = NOW(), next_review_time = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), update_time = NOW()
